diagrams.title: UX Goals-Metrics-Targets Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows the hierarchical relationship between business goals, UX goals, metrics, and targets
elements: Arrows showing flow from goals to targets
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how higher-level objectives translate to measurable targets

diagrams.title: HEART Framework Categories
diagrams.description: Visual representation of the five HEART categories with example metrics
elements: Task Success → Success rate, Time on task
diagrams.purpose: Remembering and applying HEART framework in UX measurement

diagrams.title: SUS Score Interpretation Scale
diagrams.description: Visual scale showing SUS score ranges and their interpretations
diagrams.purpose: Quick reference for interpreting SUS scores

diagrams.title: NPS Calculation Flow
diagrams.description: Step-by-step flow showing how to calculate Net Promoter Score

diagrams.title: Usability Metrics Overview
diagrams.description: Three-dimensional view of core usability metrics categorized by type
elements: Effectiveness: Task Success Rate, Error Rate
Efficiency: Time on Task, Tasks per hour
diagrams.purpose: Understanding and selecting appropriate usability metrics
